content.problemStatement:
Chef goes to the gym daily and follow a progressive bench press routine. In the 1st1^{st}1st set, Chef will lift XXX kilograms. For each subsequent set, you increase the weight by 101010 kilograms.

Your task is to calculate the amount of weight Chef will bench in the 3rd3^{rd}3rd set.


Input Format
The input consists of a single integer XXX, the weight (in kilograms) Chef benches in the 1st1^{st}1st set.



Output Format
Output a single integer — the weight (in kilograms) Chef will bench in the 3rd3^{rd}3rd set.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
In the 1st1^{st}1st set Chef benches 10 kg, in the next it becomes 20 kg and in the 3rd3^{rd}3rd it becomes 30 kg

Explanation:
In the 1st1^{st}1st set Chef benches 20 kg, in the next it becomes 30 kg and in the 3rd3^{rd}3rd it becomes 40 kg
